# Handoff Contract — {FEATURE_NAME}

## Scope
- What exact slice, bug, or decision is being handed off

## Evidence
- What is already proven
- What docs, screenshots, logs, or paths support that
- System atlas references consulted, if relevant

## Risks
- Remaining risks
- Assumptions still unproven

## Validation
- What has already been validated
- What should be validated next

## Owner
- Current owner
- Receiving owner

## Blockers
- Anything preventing the next step

## Next step
- One explicit next action with success criteria

## Atlas references
- `{SYSTEM_ATLAS_REF}`
- `{ENGINE_ATLAS_REF}`
- `{ENGINE_MAP_REF}`
- matching engine mini atlas
